panels.description: RPS as perceived by the server
panels.title: API RPS

panels.description: 4XX errors returned by API as perceived by Server

targets.expr: sum by(grpc_code) (increase(grpc_server_handled_total{grpc_code!="OK", grpc_code!="Canceled", grpc_code!="DeadlineExceeded", grpc_code!="Unavailable", grpc_code!="Internal", grpc_code!="Unknown", grpc_service=~".*PermissionsService|.*SchemaService|authzed.api.v1.ExperimentalService"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: API 4XX Errors (Server)

panels.description: 5XX errors returned by API as perceived by Server

targets.expr: sum by(grpc_method, grpc_code) (increase(grpc_server_handled_total{grpc_code!="OK", grpc_code!="AlreadyExists", grpc_code!="Canceled", grpc_code!="InvalidArgument", grpc_code!="NotFound", grpc_code!="PermissionDenied", grpc_code!="FailedPrecondition", grpc_service=~".*PermissionsService|.*SchemaService|.*ExperimentalService"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: API 5XX Errors (Server)

panels.description: shows the rate of the difference between added and evicted. Negative values means pod is evicting more than adding and suggests memory pressure

panels.title: Cache Bytes Accumulated By Pod

panels.description: The number of currently acquired connections in the pool.
panels.title: Max Currently Acquired Conns

panels.description: The cumulative count of successful acquires from the pool
panels.title: Successful/Cancelled Acquisitions

panels.description: The number of conns with construction in progress in the pool
panels.title: Max Constructing Conns

panels.description: The maximum amount of time spnt by SpiceDB waiting to acquire a connection
panels.title: Max time spent acquiring connections

panels.description:
Total: The total number of resources currently in the pool
Idle: The number of currently idle conns in the pool
Max: The maximum size of the pool
panels.title: AVG Total / Idle / Max

panels.description: The cumulative count of successful acquires from the pool that waited for a resource to be released or constructed because the pool was empty
panels.title: Acquisitions that waited

panels.description: Cumulative count of successful acquires from the pool that waited for a resource to be released or constructed because the pool was empty.
panels.title: max successful acquires after empty pool

panels.description: cockroachdb client-side tx reset distribution
panels.title: cockroachdb client-side tx reset distribution

panels.description: Difference between spicedb's tracked connections and pgx pool stats. This value should never be a sustained non-zero value.
panels.title: CRDB retry pool vs pgx pool connections

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, operation) (rate(spicedb_grpc_io_client_roundtrip_latency_bucket{grpc_client_method="google.spanner.v1.Spanner/ExecuteStreamingSql"}[$__rate_interval]))) - on () histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, grpc_client_method) (rate(spicedb_cloud_google_com_go_spanner_gfe_latency_bucket{grpc_client_method="query"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, operation) (rate(spicedb_grpc_io_client_roundtrip_latency_bucket{grpc_client_method="google.spanner.v1.Spanner/ExecuteStreamingSql"}[$__rate_interval]))) - on () histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, grpc_client_method) (rate(spicedb_cloud_google_com_go_spanner_gfe_latency_bucket{grpc_client_method="query"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.description: shows the target heap size of the next GC cycle. GC’s goal is to keep go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes less than this value
panels.title: target heap size of the next GC cycle

panels.description: time it takes for a goroutine to be scheduled
panels.title: Go Scheduler Latency

panels.description: Distribution of heap allocations by approximate size. Bucket counts increase monotonically. Note that this does not include tiny objects as defined by /gc/heap/tiny/allocs:objects, only tiny blocks.
panels.title: Heap Allocations by size distribution

panels.description: Approximate cumulative time goroutines have spent blocked on a sync.Mutex or sync.RWMutex. This metric is useful for identifying global changes in lock contention. Collect a mutex or block profile using the runtime/pprof package for more detailed contention data.
panels.title: Go Mutex Wait

panels.description: Count of calls made from Go to C by the current process.
panels.title: Go-to-C call rate
